patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
<AppNavigation> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: items, activeId, onNavigate.
<AppShell> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, navigation, status, children.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, variant, disabled, busy, onClick, type.
<Button> variant must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost'.
<Button> type must be one of 'button' | 'submit'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description, checked, disabled, indeterminate, onChange.
<ColorPicker> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, swatches, disabled, onChange.
<ControllerSurface> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, subtitle, status, statusLabel, value, unit, children, actions.
<ControllerSurface> status must be one of 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'offline' | 'readonly' | 'mismatch'.
<DeviceTile> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, room, category, summary, status, statusLabel, power, disabled, onOpen, onPowerChange.
<DeviceTile> status must be one of 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'offline' | 'readonly' | 'mismatch'.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, title, description, children, footer, closeLabel, closeOnBackdrop, onClose.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, children, disabled, onClick.
<InlineNotice> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, children, tone, action.
<InlineNotice> tone must be one of 'info' | 'error'.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, type, placeholder, helper, error, disabled, readOnly, onChange.
<Input> type must be one of 'text' | 'search' | 'number'.
<Menu> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, items, align.
<Menu> align must be one of 'start' | 'end'.
<ModalSurface> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, title, description, children, footer, onClose, closeLabel, variant, closeOnBackdrop.
<ModalSurface> variant must be one of 'dialog' | 'sheet'.
<Select> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, options, helper, error, disabled, onChange.
<Sheet> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, title, description, children, footer, closeLabel, closeOnBackdrop, onClose.
<Slider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, min, max, step, unit, disabled, onChange, onCommit.
<StatusBadge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, tone.
<StatusBadge> tone must be one of 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'offline' | 'readonly' | 'mismatch'.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description, checked, disabled, onChange.
<Tabs> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: items, value, ariaLabel, onChange.
<Toast> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, tone, title, children, action, duration, dismissLabel, onDismiss.
<Toast> tone must be one of 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, children, placement.
<Tooltip> placement must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'start' | 'end'.
